title: Agent 3: Quality Evaluation Agent Output Contract (v1)
description: Output of Agent 3 in the 3-agent evaluation pipeline. Scores the document, verifies contribution type label, and produces a recommendation. See project_description.md Section 6.2.

relevance.description: How relevant the document is to the course

completeness.description: How complete the coverage of the topic is

quality.description: Overall writing, formatting, and accuracy quality

suggested_contribution_type.description: Agent's best label based on content analysis

label_mismatch.description: True if suggested differs from initial

recommendation.description: Priority-ordered rules: (1) REJECT if duplicate, (2) REJECT if relevance < 4.0 and not cold_start, (3) NEEDS_REVIEW if cold_start, (4) NEEDS_REVIEW if relevance in [4.0, 7.0), (5) APPROVE if relevance >= 7.0 and no flags. Label mismatch is informational only.

relevance_rationale.description: Detailed explanation for the relevance score

completeness_rationale.description: Detailed explanation for the completeness score

quality_rationale.description: Detailed explanation for the quality score

evaluation_justification.description: Analytical explanations justifying the scores and final recommendation
